Explanation: The primary key column is generically named 'id' instead of a more descriptive name like 'book_id'. Consider renaming the column to 'book_id' to make it self-documenting and avoid ambiguity when joining tables.

Using selectFrom() fetches all columns from the BOOK table, which may retrieve unnecessary data and impact performance. Consider using select() with only the specific columns needed, such as context.select(Tables.BOOK.TITLE, Tables.BOOK.AUTHOR).from(Tables.BOOK).
